onboarding.welcome_description: Your all-in-one AI-powered workspace. Replace Slack, Notion, Trello, Google Drive, and Zoom with one intelligent platform.
onboarding.ai_assistant_description: ChatGPT-style AI assistant built right in. Generate documents, get answers, create content, and boost productivity with AI.
onboarding.smart_event_description: Just describe your meeting in natural language or use voice input. AI understands and finds the perfect time slot automatically.
onboarding.collaboration_description: Stay connected with instant messaging, HD video calls, screen sharing, and team channels. Work together seamlessly.
onboarding.productivity_description: Smart notes with AI writing assistant, intelligent file organization, and automated meeting summaries. Work smarter, not harder.
onboarding.project_description: Kanban boards, task tracking, time management, and AI-powered insights. Keep your team aligned and productive.
